text: Aaj ladki walo ne rishta yeh bol kar thukra diya ki mere 'medical issue' ki wajah se unki beti ko santan sukh nahi milega. Apni sacchai aur hidden identity chhupate-chhupate main itna darr gaya hoon ki mere seene mein itni bhari ghutan ho rahi hai jaise saans atak gayi ho. 'Log kya kahenge' aur family fear ke mare mere dono haath barf ki tarah thande pad gaye hain aur sir mein aisi thakan hai ki aankhein nahi khul rahi.

Rishta party ne kundali milne ke baad bhi mujhe reject kar diya kyunki kisi ne unhe meri PCOD ki report dikha di aur unhone taana mara ki main sasural ko waaris nahi de paungi. Main apni asliyat chhupane ke liye is urban isolation mein pehle hi ghut rahi thi, aur ab is naye kalesh se mere pet mein aisi marod uth rahi hai ki lagatar ulti jaisa mehsus ho raha hai. Dimaag ki naso mein ajeeb si jalan hai aur poora jism dard se toot raha hai.

Choti behen ka rishta aaj isliye wapas chala gaya kyunki ladke walo ne kaha ki mere 'medical defect' aur bina bacche ke akele rehne ka manhoos asar us par bhi padega. Apni sexuality chhupate chhupate main itna thak gaya hoon ki ye taane sunkar meri peeth aur kandho mein aisi aithan shuru ho gayi hai jo ruk nahi rahi. Dil itni zor se dhadak raha hai ki lag raha hai abhi chakkar kha kar gir jaunga.

Mummy ne zabardasti rishta walon ko bulaya tha, par unhone mere ladko jaise taur-tareeqe aur 'physical kamzori' ka bahana banakar khandaan aage badhane par sawal uthaya aur reject kar diya. Apni body se is disconnection aur is jhoothi acting ki wajah se mere gale mein ek ajeeb sa dard chubh raha hai jaise aawaz hi chhin gayi ho. Dimaag mein itna bhari pan hai ki chakkar aa rahe hain aur pairo ki saari taqat bilkul khatam ho gayi hai.

Aaj teesri baar mera rishta isliye reject hua kyunki samaj mein afwah fail gayi hai ki mujhme koi andaroori 'dosh' hai isliye main shaadi aur bacchon ke naam se bhagta hoon. Is hidden identity ke darr aur khandaan ki naak katne ke taanon se mera pet bilkul kharab ho gaya hai aur lagatar jalan ho rahi hai. Mere kaano mein ek ajeeb si seeti baj rahi hai aur aakhon ke aage itna andhera hai ki main theek se khada bhi nahi ho pa raha.
